chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1358 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Fag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6422/2021 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 14-10-2021 Mr. Shafqat Rahim Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 5. Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Comments have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2 to 5, which are taken on record. Through this Petition, the petitioner has impugned a blacklisting order dated 05-06-2021, wherein the only reason assigned is alleged fraud and engaging in legal battles with Pakistan Railways. On the very first date, we have suspended the said order, and today, we have been informed that a proper show-cause notice dated 03-09-2020 was also issued, however, on perusal of the impugned order, it does not reflect that any reasoning, which was required to be assigned, has been done nor the allegations in the show-cause notice are reflecting in the impugned order, therefore, the order cannot be sustained and his hereby set aside. However, since a show-cause notice has been issued, the petitioner shall respond and thereafter the concerned respondent(s) shall, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, pass a reasoned and speaking order, and if the petitioner is further aggrieved, he is at liberty to seek appropriate remedy as may be available in law. Let this exercise be completed preferably within a period of sixty days from today. With these observations, the Petition stands disposed of with pending application.
Let this exercise be completed preferably within a period of sixty days from today. With these observations, the Petition stands disposed of with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
